name: mark_employee_call_in
description: Mark a scheduled employee shift as a call-in, classify the absence, update accruals, and convert the shift to an open shift.

requiredFields.name: employee_name
requiredFields.label: Employee Name
requiredFields.description: The full name or ID of the employee who called in.

requiredFields.name: shift_date
requiredFields.label: Shift Date
requiredFields.description: The date of the shift the employee is calling in for.

requiredFields.name: shift_start_time
requiredFields.label: Shift Start Time
requiredFields.description: Optional: The start time of the specific shift (e.g., '09:00 AM'), if the employee has multiple shifts on the same day.

requiredFields.name: absence_type
requiredFields.label: Absence Type
requiredFields.description: How the call-in absence should be coded.

confirmationMessage: You are about to process a call-in for {employee_name} for a shift on {shift_date}. The absence will be coded as {absence_type}. This action will convert the assigned shift to an open shift and update accrual and payroll records. Are you sure you want to proceed?
successMessage: Successfully processed {employee_name}'s call-in for {shift_date}. The shift has been converted to an open shift, and accrual and payroll records have been updated.

name: view_employee_accrual_balances
description: Retrieve and display the current accrual balances (e.g., PTO, Sick Leave) for a specified employee.

requiredFields.name: employee_name
requiredFields.label: Employee Name
requiredFields.description: The full name or ID of the employee to view balances for.

confirmationMessage: You are about to retrieve the accrual balances for {employee_name}. Proceed?

name: view_employee_scheduled_shifts
description: Display the upcoming scheduled shifts for a specified employee.

requiredFields.name: employee_name
requiredFields.label: Employee Name
requiredFields.description: The full name or ID of the employee to view scheduled shifts for.

requiredFields.name: start_date
requiredFields.label: Start Date
requiredFields.description: Optional: The start date for the period to view shifts. Defaults to today.

requiredFields.name: end_date
requiredFields.label: End Date
requiredFields.description: Optional: The end date for the period to view shifts. Defaults to 7 days from the start date.

confirmationMessage: You are about to view scheduled shifts for {employee_name}. Proceed?

name: view_call_in_history
description: Retrieve a historical record of call-ins, filtered by employee or date range.

requiredFields.name: employee_name
requiredFields.label: Employee Name
requiredFields.description: Optional: Full name or ID of a specific employee to view call-ins for.

requiredFields.name: start_date
requiredFields.label: Start Date
requiredFields.description: Optional: The start date for the period to view call-ins. Defaults to 30 days ago.

requiredFields.name: end_date
requiredFields.label: End Date
requiredFields.description: Optional: The end date for the period to view call-ins. Defaults to today.

confirmationMessage: You are about to retrieve the call-in history. Proceed?
